name: Tkemali<sour Prune Sauce>
recipeInstructions:
1. NOTE: Dried prunes may be used but must be soaked overnight in the vinegar.
2. Bring the water to a boil. Add the prunes and remove from heat. Allow to stand for 10 minutes.
3. Bring back to a boil over high heat and cook for 10 minutes or until tender.
4. Put prunes into a sieve. Save the liquid.
5. Combine prunes, garlic, and cilantro in a blender. Pour in 1/4 cup of the liquid and blend on high speed.
6. Add the remaining liquid slowly until all is used.
7. Transfer the blended mixture to a saucepan. Add the salt and pepper.
8. Bring to a boil over high heat. Reduce heat to simmer and add the lemon juice.
9. Stir and simmer for 3 minutes.
10. Pour over fish, poultry, or pork.
ORIGIN: Dr. Verona Gubensko, Almaty, Kazakhstan
She is a Russian from the Caucus region and told me that this is an old caucus recipe.
